subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the Ocean of divine knowledge and hath drunk therefrom through My Name, the All-Merciful, that he may be drawn by this mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی بحر العرفان و شرب منه باسمی الرحمن لیجذبه ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @knowledge; recognition of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
